case_title: BOB KIDWELL VS. BENJAMIN BORGO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIDWELL, BOB ON DEFENDANT BORGO, BENJAMIN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIDWELL, BOB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORGO, BENJAMIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3416 TARAVAL #5, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIDWELL, BOB AS TO DEFENDANT BORGO, BENJAMIN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SERVE SUMMONS,COMPLAINT AND PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION BY POSTING AND CERTIFIED MAIL;, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIDWELL, BOB
DECLARATION OF JOHN P. ZANGHI RE: LOST RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIDWELL, BOB
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BORGO, BENJAMIN
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS SIGNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (THERE IS ALSO P&M PER CCP 415.45 WITH THE COURT ORDER), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIDWELL, BOB SERVED JUN-22-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BORGO, BENJAMIN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BORGO, BENJAMIN
ORDER FOR POSTING OF SUMMONS HAS BEEN DENIED W/O PREJUDICE.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $207.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BORGO, BENJAMIN
